title: Stop Claude from forgetting anything
summary: Hermes is a memory management tool for Claude that persists context and learnings across project sessions. It maintains a unified memory store and skill library so users do not lose context when starting new projects, addressing Claude's session reset limitation.
writeup: This video covers Hermes, a memory management tool for Claude that persists context and learnings across project sessions. It addresses Claude's session reset limitation, where context is lost when new projects begin. Hermes maintains a unified memory store and a skill library so accumulated context and learnings carry over rather than starting fresh each session.
